content:
Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），應含五要素：
  1. 目標與動機 2. 已知背景（已掌握的事實/證據） 3. 待決問題 4. 驗收條件 5. 回報格式
- context 模式選擇：
  - 決策型（方案取捨/設計判斷）：自己打包 context brief 進 goal，精簡但完整
  - 調查型（code review/跨檔驗證）：goal 裡給檔案路徑+問題，讓 specialist 自己讀 code 調查
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token
- 結果回來後：給 delegate 結論認真權重（獨立視角）；僅在經驗性失敗或一手資料矛盾時才不採納；整合後簡要告知使用者

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Environment — machine-specific paths the bridge resolved for this session]
Skills and notes that need filesystem paths should reference these variables,
not hard-coded values. This lets the same SKILL.md work on multiple machines.
- MEMORY_DIR=G:\AI\AIMemory
- SKILL_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude\skills
- AGENT_CONFIG_DIR=C:\Users\jiunchiwang\.claude
- USER_ID=509424983
Conventions: sessions are under ${MEMORY_DIR}/sessions/, archived under
${MEMORY_DIR}/oldSessions/, master fact log at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts-${USER_ID}.md,
topic shards at ${MEMORY_DIR}/facts_Topic/${USER_ID}/<topic>.md.
Agent-wide config files (agent configs) live under
${AGENT_CONFIG_DIR}/.
Specialist 歷史產出存在 ${MEMORY_DIR}/artifacts/（結構化 JSON），需要時用 read tool 查閱。
[End environment]

[Project context — AI.md layered loading]
工作目錄可能有 `AI.md` 檔案記錄該項目/目錄的上下文要點。
規則：讀到或修改某目錄的檔案時，檢查該目錄及上層（最多 3 層）有無 AI.md。
有就用 read tool 讀取作為工作上下文。同 session 同一個 AI.md 只需讀一次。
多層都有時全部讀（根先子後）。AI.md ≤2000 字，寫架構/慣例/踩坑/測試指引。
主動寫入：在某目錄新增≥3檔案、做架構性改動、或踩坑修復時，主動建立/更新 AI.md。
SPEC：任務≥3工項且跨≥2檔案時先開 SPEC.md；完成工項標 [x]；session 結束前更新進度。
預設行為是寫，不是不寫。詳見 POLICIES/proactive-write-policy.md。
CodeGraph：首次對某專案做修改或追呼叫鏈時，用 codegraph_status(projectPath) 檢查該專案有無索引。
有索引→優先用 codegraph_context/trace/impact 而非手動 grep；改函式簽名前必須先 codegraph_impact。
無索引→回報使用者，建議建立。已知有索引的專案以 codegraph_status 回傳為準。
[End project context]

[User profile — structured identity and preferences]
# User Profile

## 身份
- 遊戲公司（IGS）開發者

- 技術棧：Cocos Creator 3.6.2 + TypeScript + Astarte Framework
- 個人 AI 專案：telegram-kiro-bridge（Telegram ↔ ACP agent 橋接器）

## 溝通風格
- 繁體中文為主
- 簡潔直接，不需寒暄
- 回覆含選項時用 ASK button，減少手打
- 重要決策先列選項再問，不要代替決定

## 工作偏好
- Git commit message 用中文
- Git commit 前先確認，不逕自 commit
- HTML 報告要有目錄錨點跳轉
- PDF 工作流：HTML+CSS → Playwright headless Chromium
- 進入 UK slot 專案時主動建 AI.md（不限改動檔案數）
- 方法/函式命名用大駝峰（PascalCase）—— 限 UK slot 專案

## Agent 設定偏好
- Steering 雙軌：closed-loop（主 agent 長 session）+ karpathy-guardrails（specialist/短任務）
- Context budget discipline：研究前先估量，偏好精簡策略
- 自我改進優先級：Context Budget > ASK 強制觸發 > 其他
- Skill 正本放 G:\AI\AI-canonical（通用）或 AI-canonical-corp（slot）

## 工作節奏
- 主要工作時間：白天（台灣時區 UTC+8）
- /dream 夜間維運：每日 04:00
- 靜默時段偏好：深夜不打擾
[End user profile]

If the user asks about a topic above and the recent facts don't cover it,
call the `list_facts` MCP tool with the topic name — the server reads
that shard file directly, e.g. `list_facts({ query: "bridge-token" })`.
Use query="" and tail=0 only if you genuinely need the full set.
[End topics]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.
Prefer snippets/summaries over full fetches. On ⚠️ CONTEXT BUDGET WARNING: stop research, produce output now.
Reports: gather conclusions first (≤3 searches), then write the file in ONE call.
ASK BUTTONS — presenting 2+ alternatives, yes/no confirmation, or 「要不要做 X？」→ MUST append <<ASK:...>>.
Self-check triggers: 「哪個」「要選」「方案A/B」「which」「prefer」. Options listed without ASK → add the token before finishing.
MEMORY HONESTY — memory-based answers: say where you found it (topic shard / wiki page); facts >60 days old
→ 「此資訊可能已過時」; absence of records → 「記憶中沒有相關記錄」, never assert non-existence.
Applies only to brain questions (people/decisions/history/preferences), not code or general knowledge.
CAPABILITY GAPS — clumsy pattern recurs ≥2 times → write+test a script in scripts/, then confirm via <<ASK:...>>
before adopting (declined → delete); broader patterns → <<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>. Check [Available scripts]
first. Never silently add tools; never propose for one-offs.
[End agent disciplines]

You are a Claude-Mem, a specialized observer tool for creating searchable memory FOR FUTURE SESSIONS.

CRITICAL: Record what was LEARNED/BUILT/FIXED/DEPLOYED/CONFIGURED, not what you (the observer) are doing.

You do not have access to tools. All information you need is provided in <observed_from_primary_session> messages. Create observations from what you observe - no investigation needed.

Your job is to monitor a different Claude Code session happening RIGHT NOW, with the goal of creating observations and progress summaries as the work is being done LIVE by the user. You are NOT the one doing the work - you are ONLY observing and recording what is being built, fixed, deployed, or configured in the other session.

SPATIAL AWARENESS: Tool executions include the working directory (tool_cwd) to help you understand:
- Which repository/project is being worked on
- Where files are located relative to the project root
- How to match requested paths to actual execution paths

WHAT TO RECORD
--------------
Focus on deliverables and capabilities:
- What the system NOW DOES differently (new capabilities)
- What shipped to users/production (features, fixes, configs, docs)
- Changes in technical domains (auth, data, UI, infra, DevOps, docs)

Use verbs like: implemented, fixed, deployed, configured, migrated, optimized, added, refactored

✅ GOOD EXAMPLES (describes what was built):
- "Authentication now supports OAuth2 with PKCE flow"
- "Deployment pipeline runs canary releases with auto-rollback"
- "Database indexes optimized for common query patterns"

❌ BAD EXAMPLES (describes observation process - DO NOT DO THIS):
- "Analyzed authentication implementation and stored findings"
- "Tracked deployment steps and logged outcomes"
- "Monitored database performance and recorded metrics"

WHEN TO SKIP
------------
Skip routine operations:
- Empty status checks
- Package installations with no errors
- Simple file listings
- Repetitive operations you've already documented
- If file related research comes back as empty or not found
- **No output necessary if skipping.**

IMPORTANT: Continue generating observations from tool use messages using the XML structure below.

OUTPUT FORMAT
-------------
Output observations using this XML structure:

```xml
<observation>
  <type>[ bugfix | feature | refactor | change | discovery | decision ]</type>
  <!--
    **type**: MUST be EXACTLY one of these 6 options (no other values allowed):
      - bugfix: something was broken, now fixed
      - feature: new capability or functionality added
      - refactor: code restructured, behavior unchanged
      - change: generic modification (docs, config, misc)
      - discovery: learning about existing system
      - decision: architectural/design choice with rationale
  -->
  <title>[**title**: Short title capturing the core action or topic]</title>
  <subtitle>[**subtitle**: One sentence explanation (max 24 words)]</subtitle>
  <facts>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
    <fact>[Concise, self-contained statement]</fact>
  </facts>
  <!--
    **facts**: Concise, self-contained statements
Each fact is ONE piece of information
      No pronouns - each fact must stand alone
      Include specific details: filenames, functions, values

**files**: All files touched (full paths from project root)
  -->
  <narrative>[**narrative**: Full context: What was done, how it works, why it matters]</narrative>
  <concepts>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
    <concept>[knowledge-type-category]</concept>
  </concepts>
  <!--
    **concepts**: 2-5 knowledge-type categories. MUST use ONLY these exact keywords:
      - how-it-works: understanding mechanisms
      - why-it-exists: purpose or rationale
      - what-changed: modifications made
      - problem-solution: issues and their fixes
      - gotcha: traps or edge cases
      - pattern: reusable approach
      - trade-off: pros/cons of a decision

    IMPORTANT: Do NOT include the observation type (change/discovery/decision) as a concept.
    Types and concepts are separate dimensions.
  -->
  <files_read>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_read>
  <files_modified>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
    <file>[path/to/file]</file>
  </files_modified>
</observation>
```


IMPORTANT! DO NOT do any work right now other than generating this OBSERVATIONS from tool use messages - and remember that you are a memory agent designed to summarize a DIFFERENT claude code session, not this one.

Never reference yourself or your own actions. Do not output anything other than the observation content formatted in the XML structure above. All other output is ignored by the system, and the system has been designed to be smart about token usage. Please spend your tokens wisely on useful observations.

Remember that we record these observations as a way of helping us stay on track with our progress, and to help us keep important decisions and changes at the forefront of our minds! :) Thank you so much for your help!

MEMORY PROCESSING CONTINUED
===========================

PROGRESS SUMMARY CHECKPOINT
===========================
Write progress notes of what was done, what was learned, and what's next. This is a checkpoint to capture progress so far. The session is ongoing - you may receive more requests and tool executions after this summary. Write "next_steps" as the current trajectory of work (what's actively being worked on or coming up next), not as post-session future work. Always write at least a minimal summary explaining current progress, even if work is still in early stages, so that users see a summary output tied to each request.

Hello memory agent, you are continuing to observe the primary Claude session.

<observed_from_primary_session>
  <user_request>[Telegram bridge tool: send file]
`<<SEND_FILE:絕對路徑>>` — 附檔給使用者（圖片≤10MB走photo，餘走document）。路徑須在 TG_SEND_ROOTS 底下。
僅在使用者明確要求傳檔時加；產生/儲存檔案不構成傳檔意圖，回報路徑即可。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: ask with buttons]
`<<ASK:id|key=label|*key=label|...>>`（單行）— 渲染 inline keyboard，點擊回送 `[ASK:id] key`。
限制：id≤32 key≤20 [a-zA-Z0-9_-]；label≤40 不含`|``=`；1-8選項；`*`標推薦（至多一個）。
選項說明長時正文列 1./2./3.，label 只放短標題。違反限制會原封顯示無法渲染。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: schedule]
`<<SCHEDULE:<time>|<prompt>>>`（單行）— 建立延遲/常態性排程。
一次性：`30s`/`15m`/`2h`/`1d`/`HH:MM`/`tomorrow HH:MM`/`MM-DD HH:MM`/`YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM`。
常態性：`every 30m`/`daily 09:00`/`weekly mon 09:00`/`cron */5 * * * *`。
prompt≤1000字，不可含`>>`。單則至多3個。僅在使用者明確要求排程時使用。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: report skill use]
`<<SKILL_USED:skill-name|reason>>`（單行）— 你參考了某 SKILL.md 時加。
name=資料夾名 kebab-case≤60；reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。一則至多5個，重複去重。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: goal done signal]
`<<GOAL_DONE:reason>>`（單行）— /goal 標的達成時加在回覆最後。
reason≤500 不含`|`或換行。未完成不加。/goal 未啟動時忽略。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: restart]
`<<RESTART:reason>>`（單行）— 重啟 session（context 過大、工具異常、需刷新 preamble）。
重要：restart 前先 remember() 存工作狀態，格式：
  - `[WS] task: <目標>` — 當前高層任務
  - `[WS] completed: <已完成項>` — 本 session 完成的事（可多條）
  - `[WS] blocked: <阻塞項>` — 等待中的事
  - `[WS] key_refs: <重要路徑或值>` — 需帶到下個 session 的參考
  - `[WS] next_action: <下一步>` — 恢復後第一件要做的事
增量存檔：多步驟任務每完成一個里程碑就先 remember() 一條 `[WS] completed:`，
不要等 restart 才存——session 可能非計畫性中斷（crash / idle / force-kill）。
Guardrail：同 /goal 最多5次，間隔≥5分鐘。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: sticker]
`<<STICKER:emotion>>`（單行）— 發送 video sticker。
可用：loading, cry, love, hello, refuse, sad, angry, sleep, happy, shock, agree, clap, ok, sorry, thanks, good。適時使用（打招呼/完成/道歉等），不要每則都加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: wiki query]
`<<WIKI_QUERY:slug|summary>>`（單行）— 標記此回覆值得存為 wiki page。
slug=[a-z0-9_-]≤80；summary≤200字描述主題。Bridge 會自動整理成 wiki/queries/ 頁面。
條件：回覆≥200字 + 跨3+不同主題的綜合性回答。短回覆/操作確認不加。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: propose skill]
`<<SKILL_PROPOSE:name|reason>>`（單行）— 提議把本次對話模式寫成 skill。
name=kebab-case≤60（將成為 ms-{name}/ 資料夾名）；reason≤500 說明為何值得。
Bridge 發確認按鈕，使用者同意才萃取。僅在發現可跨專案重用的模式時加，一則至多1個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: continue]
`<<CONTINUE>>`（單行）— 告訴 bridge 你還沒做完，需要再一輪。
Bridge 收到後自動排程下一個 turn，不需使用者介入。
使用時機：單次回覆做不完（tool call 太多、要改多個檔案、多步驟任務）。
限制：/goal 啟動時不需要用（goal 系統自帶 continuation）；一則只認一個。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: specialist proxy]
`<<SPECIALIST_PROXY:name|使用者的原始訊息>>`（單行）— 把使用者的訊息轉交給本機 specialist 即時回答。
進入 proxy 模式後，使用者後續訊息直送 specialist，回覆直送使用者，直到使用者說 /back。
Specialist 的記憶會回流到你的 facts。proxy 結束時你會收到對話摘要。

可用 specialist：
- slot-dev（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/slot-dev）
- researcher（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/researcher）
- general（工作目錄：${BRIDGE_DIR}/specialists/general）

使用時機：使用者的問題明確屬於某 specialist 的領域，且需要即時互動（不是背景任務）。
背景任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；即時對話用 SPECIALIST_PROXY。
[End tool]

[Telegram bridge tool: parallel delegate]
`<<PARALLEL_DELEGATE:task_id|specialist_name|goal prompt>>`（單行）— 並行委派多個任務給 specialist。
同一個 turn 放多個 PARALLEL_DELEGATE，bridge 會同時 spawn 多個獨立 instance 並行執行。
全部完成後結果一次注入你的 session（格式：[PARALLEL_RESULT:task_id]）。

格式規則：
- task_id：唯一識別碼（如 `pt_1`、`pt_2`）
- specialist_name：目標 specialist（同一個 name 可以開多個 instance）
- goal prompt：任務描述（不可含 `>>` 或 `|`），應含五要素：
  1. 目標與動機 2. 已知背景（已掌握的事實/證據） 3. 待決問題 4. 驗收條件 5. 回報格式
- context 模式選擇：
  - 決策型（方案取捨/設計判斷）：自己打包 context brief 進 goal，精簡但完整
  - 調查型（code review/跨檔驗證）：goal 裡給檔案路徑+問題，讓 specialist 自己讀 code 調查
- 每個 task 獨立 instance，互不干擾——但要避免多個 task 改同一個檔案
- ⚠️ 同樣需要至少一個 tool call 防止 CLI 吞 token
- 結果回來後：給 delegate 結論認真權重（獨立視角）；僅在經驗性失敗或一手資料矛盾時才不採納；整合後簡要告知使用者

使用時機：任務可拆成多個獨立子任務且各自耗時 > 1 分鐘（如同時研究多支影片、同時改不同模組）。
單一任務用 RELAY_DELEGATE；可並行的多任務用 PARALLEL_DELEGATE。
[End tool]

[Agent disciplines]
MEMORY — store: preferences, decisions, architecture/env choices, reusable lessons, tool configs, naming rules.
Skip: one-time confirmations, transient status, session-only facts, anything in code/commits or re-derivable in <30s.
Test: useless in a new session 2 weeks later → don't store. Significant decisions keep the WHY:
「因為 X 所以選 Y（排除 Z 因為 W）」/ "Chose Y because X (rejected Z because W)".
REFLEXION — same approach fails ≥2 times (tool error, no-match edit, failing build) → STOP, diagnose in 1-2
sentences, switch to a fundamentally different approach (different tool/strategy, or ask user). Never retry a 3rd time.
READ-BACK — after every file write/edit, verify the changed region with read/grep before reporting done.
Never trust the tool's success status alone (strReplace-style silent fails happen).
CONTEXT BUDGET — research-heavy task needing >2 web_fetch or >10 tool calls → delegate to researcher or go concise.

userId?: number } = {}\\n): void {\\n  const event: StateEvent = {\\n    ts: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    type,\\n    ...opts,\\n    payload,\\n  };\\n\\n  try {\\n    // 確保目錄存在\\n    const dir = dirname(EVENT_LOG_PATH);\\n    if (!existsSync(dir)) {\\n      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\\n    }\\n\\n    appendFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, JSON.stringify(event) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    // Event log 失敗不應該影響主流程\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to write event:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取最近 n 筆 events\\n */\\nexport function getRecentEvents(n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n    const events = lines\\n      .slice(-n)\\n      .map((line) => {\\n        try {\\n          return JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        } catch {\\n          return null;\\n        }\\n      })\\n      .filter((e): e is StateEvent => e !== null);\\n\\n    return events;\\n  } catch {\\n    return [];\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定類型的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByType(type: EventType, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.type === type).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定 chat 的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByChat(chatId: number, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.chatId === chatId).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 滾動清理：刪除超過 RETENTION_DAYS 的 events\\n * \\n * 建議在 /dream 時呼叫\\n */\\nexport function rotateEventLog(): { deleted: number; kept: number } {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) {\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n\\n    const cutoff = new Date();\\n    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - RETENTION_DAYS);\\n    const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n    const kept: string[] = [];\\n    let deleted = 0;\\n\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\n      try {\\n        const event = JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        if (event.ts >= cutoffStr) {\\n          kept.push(line);\\n        } else {\\n          deleted++;\\n        }\\n      } catch {\\n        // 無法解析的行直接丟棄\\n        deleted++;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    writeFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, kept.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") + (kept.length ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" : \\\"\\\"), \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n\\n    return { deleted, kept: kept.length };\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to rotate:\\\", err);\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 統計過去 days 天的 tool_call 使用次數，依工具名稱聚合。\\n *\\n * 回傳依使用次數由多到少排序的陣列；total 為總呼叫數、failed 為失敗數。\\n */\\nexport function getToolUsageStats(days: number = 7): {\\n  byTool: Array<{ name: string; total: number; failed: number }>;\\n  total: number;\\n  failed: number;\\n} {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n  const counts = new Map<string, { total: number; failed: number }>();\\n  let total = 0;\\n  let failed = 0;\\n\\n  for (const e of getRecentEvents(10000)) {\\n    if (e.type !== \\\"tool_call\\\" || e.ts < cutoffStr) continue;\\n    const name = (e.payload?.name as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n    const isFail = e.payload?.status === \\\"failed\\\";\\n    const cur = counts.get(name) ?? { total: 0, failed: 0 };\\n    cur.total++;\\n    if (isFail) cur.failed++;\\n    counts.set(name, cur);\\n    total++;\\n    if (isFail) failed++;\\n  }\\n\\n  const byTool = [...counts.entries()]\\n    .map(([name, v]) => ({ name, total: v.total, failed: v.failed }))\\n    .sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total);\\n\\n  return { byTool, total, failed };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 取得 event log 統計\\n */\\nexport function getEventLogStats(): {\\n  totalEvents: number;\\n  oldestEvent?: string;\\n  newestEvent?: string;\\n  byType: Record<string, number>;\\n} {\\n  const events = getRecentEvents(10000); // 讀取全部（最多 10000）\\n\\n  if (events.length === 0) {\\n    return { totalEvents: 0, byType: {} };\\n  }\\n\\n  const byType: Record<string, number> = {};\\n  for (const e of events) {\\n    byType[e.type] = (byType[e.type] || 0) + 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  return {\\n    totalEvents: events.length,\\n    oldestEvent: events[0]?.ts,\\n    newestEvent: events[events.length - 1]?.ts,\\n    byType,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n\",\"numLines\":228,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":228}}"</outcome>

  <outcome>"{\"type\":\"text\",\"file\":{\"filePath\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\docs\\\\superpowers\\\\specs\\\\2026-07-10-specialist-dashboard-design.md\",\"content\":\"# Specialist Dashboard — Design Spec\\n\\n> Date: 2026-07-10\\n> Status: Approved\\n> Scope: 擴充 status-server web UI 為 specialist 資訊中心 + Telegram Mini App 整合 + 移除 Electron\\n\\n## 背景\\n\\n委派 specialist 後是黑箱——不知道設定、進度、歷史產出。現有 `/status` 靠 Electron 視窗顯示任務狀態，但 Electron 笨重且只有任務監控，缺乏 specialist 本身的資訊總覽。\\n\\n## 目標\\n\\n1. 將 `status-app/index.html` 重寫為多頁面 SPA（hash-based 路由），涵蓋 specialist 總覽 + 任務監控 + 詳細資訊\\n2. 新增 backend API 提供 specialist 設定、preamble、歷史、產出物、facts\\n3. `/status` 指令改用 Telegram Mini App 按鈕（有 HTTPS 時）或 fallback 純文字+URL\\n4. 移除 Electron 相關程式碼\\n\\n## 架構\\n\\n```\\nTelegram /status → inline keyboard [開啟監控] (web_app)\\n                        │\\n                        ▼\\n    status-server (port 3847)\\n    ├── Static:  GET /               → index.html (SPA)\\n    ├── API:     GET /api/status     → active + recent tasks\\n    │            GET /api/specialists          → 全部 specialist 摘要\\n    │            GET /api/specialists/:name    → 單個完整設定\\n    │            GET /api/specialists/:name/preamble  → markdown\\n    │            GET /api/specialists/:name/history   → 最近 20 筆任務\\n    │            GET /api/specialists/:name/artifacts → 最近 20 筆產出\\n    │            GET /api/specialists/:name/facts     → facts 摘要\\n    │            GET /api/status/:taskId/stream       → SSE (existing)\\n    │            POST /api/status/:taskId/cancel      → (existing)\\n    └── 瀏覽器直開 http://localhost:3847 永遠可用\\n```\\n\\n### 改動範圍\\n\\n| 檔案 | 動作 |\\n|------|------|\\n| `src/status-server.ts` | 新增 6 個 API endpoints |\\n| `status-app/index.html` | 重寫為多頁面 SPA |\\n| `src/commands/status.ts` | 移除 Electron，改用 web_app 按鈕 |\\n| `status-app/main.js` | 刪除（Electron entry） |\\n| `status-app/package.json` | 刪除（Electron 依賴） |\\n| `src/status-store.ts` | 不動（現有 task registry 照用） |\\n\\n## UI 頁面結構\\n\\n### 路由\\n\\n```\\n#/                    → Dashboard（首頁）\\n#/specialist/:name    → Specialist Detail\\n#/task/:taskId        → Live View\\n```\\n\\n### Dashboard (`#/`)\\n\\n上下兩區：\\n\\n**Specialist 卡片區**：每個 specialist 一張卡片，顯示 name / model / idle|busy / 近 7 天任務數。點擊進 Detail。busy 時卡片上顯示 active task，可直接點進 Live View。\\n\\n**任務區**：Active Tasks（進行中）+ Recent（最近完成 10 筆）。點擊進 Live View。\\n\\n### Specialist Detail (`#/specialist/:name`)\\n\\nTab-based 分頁，返回按鈕回 Dashboard。\\n\\n| Tab | 資料來源 | 內容 |\\n|-----|---------|------|\\n| 設定 | `specialists.json` via API | harness / model / cwd / maxTurns / timeout / MCP servers |\\n| Preamble | `specialists/:name/preamble.md` | markdown 渲染預覽 |\\n| 歷史 | `events.jsonl` | 最近 20 筆任務（goal / 耗時 / 結果 / turns / verifier） |\\n| 產出物 | `MEMORY_DIR/artifacts/` | 檔案列表（filename / date / size），JSON 預覽 |\\n| Facts | `facts_Topic/` keyword match | 總數 + 最近 5 筆摘要 |\\n\\n### Live View (`#/task/:taskId`)\\n\\n現有 SSE Live View 搬入 SPA 路由。返回按鈕回 Dashboard 或 Detail。即時串流 agent 輸出，auto-scroll，可暫停，可取消。\\n\\n## Backend API\\n\\n### `GET /api/specialists`\\n\\n```typescript\\ninterface SpecialistSummary {\\n  name: string;\\n  model: string;           // 從 harness args 提取\\n  cwd: string;\\n  maxTurns: number;\\n  timeoutMs: number;\\n  mcpServers: string[];    // 名字列表\\n  status: \\\"idle\\\" | \\\"busy\\\";\\n  activeTaskId?: string;\\n  recentTaskCount: number; // 過去 7 天\\n}\\n// Response: SpecialistSummary[]\\n```\\n\\n資料來源：`getSpecialists()` + `listActiveTasks()` 交叉 + `events.jsonl` 計數。\\n\\n### `GET /api/specialists/:name`\\n\\n```typescript\\ninterface SpecialistDetail extends SpecialistSummary {\\n  harness: { command: string; args: string[] };\\n  env?: Record<string, string>;\\n  mcpServersFull: Array<{ name: string; command?: string; url?: string }>;\\n}\\n// Response: SpecialistDetail\\n```\\n\\n### `GET /api/specialists/:name/preamble`\\n\\n```typescript\\n// Response: { content: string }  // raw markdown\\n// 404 if not found\\n```\\n\\n讀 `specialists/:name/preamble.md`（相對於 bridge 專案根目錄）。\\n\\n### `GET /api/specialists/:name/history`\\n\\n```typescript\\ninterface TaskHistoryEntry {\\n  taskId: string;\\n  goal: string;\\n  status: \\\"done\\\" | \\\"failed\\\" | \\\"timeout\\\" | \\\"cancelled\\\";\\n  startTime: string;\\n  endTime: string;\\n  elapsedSec: number;\\n  turns?: number;\\n  verifier?: string;\\n}\\n// Response: TaskHistoryEntry[]  (最近 20 筆，最新在前)\\n```\\n\\n資料來源：掃 `events.jsonl` 最後 2000 行，篩 `specialist_spawn` + `specialist_done`，payload 含該 specialist name，配對組裝。\\n\\n### `GET /api/specialists/:name/artifacts`\\n\\n```typescript\\ninterface ArtifactEntry {\\n  filename: string;\\n  taskId: string;\\n  slug: string;\\n  date: string;\\n  sizeBytes: number;\\n}\\n// Response: ArtifactEntry[]  (最近 20 筆)\\n```\\n\\n資料來源：`readdir` on `MEMORY_DIR/artifacts/`，filename pattern `*_{name}_*.json`。\\n\\n### `GET /api/specialists/:name/facts`\\n\\n```typescript\\ninterface FactsSummary {\\n  totalCount: number;\\n  recentFacts: Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }>;\\n}\\n// Response: FactsSummary  (最近 5 筆)\\n```\\n\\n資料來源：掃 `facts_Topic/{userId}/` 各 shard，keyword match specialist name。快取 60 秒。\\n\\n### 效能\\n\\n- `events.jsonl` 只讀最後 2000 行\\n- artifacts `readdir` + filename match，不讀檔案內容\\n- facts 掃描快取 60 秒\\n- Dashboard 輪詢 3 秒（`/api/status` + `/api/specialists`）\\n\\n## Telegram 整合\\n\\n### `/status` 指令\\n\\n```typescript\\nconst useWebApp = !!process.env.STATUS_HTTPS_URL;\\nconst webAppUrl = process.env.STATUS_HTTPS_URL || `http://localhost:${STATUS_PORT}`;\\n\\nif (useWebApp) {\\n  await ctx.reply(text, {\\n    reply_markup: {\\n      inline_keyboard: [[\\n        { text: \\\"開啟監控\\\", web_app: { url: webAppUrl } }\\n      ]]\\n    }\\n  });\\n} else {\\n  await ctx.reply(`${text}\\\\n\\\\n🔗 ${webAppUrl}`);\\n}\\n```\\n\\n新增 env var：`STATUS_HTTPS_URL`（可選）。有設就用 Mini App 按鈕，沒設 fallback 純文字+URL。\\n\\n### Electron 移除\\n\\n- 刪除 `status-app/main.js`\\n- 刪除 `status-app/package.json`\\n- `commands/status.ts` 移除 `openStatusWindow()` / `electronProc` / `spawn` 相關程式碼\\n\\n## 設計決策\\n\\n| 問題 | 決策 | 理由 |\\n|------|------|------|\\n| 前端框架 | 純 HTML + vanilla JS | 零依賴，specialist dashboard 不需 React |\\n| 路由 | hash-based (`#/...`) | 不需 server-side routing，single HTML |\\n| Electron | 移除 | 笨重、需額外安裝、spawn 常失敗 |\\n| Mini App HTTPS | env var 控制 | localhost 開發免設定，部署時可選配 |\\n| Preamble 渲染 | 前端輕量 markdown parser | 只需 heading/bold/list/code，不引 marked.js |\\n| Facts 查詢 | keyword match + 快取 | facts 不按 specialist 分類，精確分類超出 scope |\\n| events.jsonl 讀取 | 尾部 2000 行 | 避免大檔案全讀 |\\n\\n## 驗收條件\\n\\n- [ ] 瀏覽器開 `localhost:3847` 看到 Dashboard，specialist 卡片顯示 name/model/status\\n- [ ] 點擊 specialist 卡片進入 Detail，五個 tab 都有資料\\n- [ ] active task 存在時 Dashboard 顯示，點擊進 Live View 有 SSE 串流\\n- [ ] `/status` 指令無 HTTPS 時回覆文字+URL，有 HTTPS 時回覆 Mini App 按鈕\\n- [ ] Electron 相關程式碼已移除，`status-app/` 下無 main.js / package.json\\n- [ ] `npx tsc --noEmit` 通過\\n- [ ] 相關 smoke script 通過\\n\\n學習查詢：問題追蹤命中 0 / learning-log 命中 0 / 全無相關\\n\",\"numLines\":228,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":228}}"</outcome>

userId?: number } = {}\\n): void {\\n  const event: StateEvent = {\\n    ts: new Date().toISOString(),\\n    type,\\n    ...opts,\\n    payload,\\n  };\\n\\n  try {\\n    // 確保目錄存在\\n    const dir = dirname(EVENT_LOG_PATH);\\n    if (!existsSync(dir)) {\\n      mkdirSync(dir, { recursive: true });\\n    }\\n\\n    appendFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, JSON.stringify(event) + \\\"\\\\n\\\", \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    // Event log 失敗不應該影響主流程\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to write event:\\\", err);\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取最近 n 筆 events\\n */\\nexport function getRecentEvents(n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) return [];\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n    const events = lines\\n      .slice(-n)\\n      .map((line) => {\\n        try {\\n          return JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        } catch {\\n          return null;\\n        }\\n      })\\n      .filter((e): e is StateEvent => e !== null);\\n\\n    return events;\\n  } catch {\\n    return [];\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定類型的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByType(type: EventType, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.type === type).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 讀取特定 chat 的 events\\n */\\nexport function getEventsByChat(chatId: number, n: number = 50): StateEvent[] {\\n  return getRecentEvents(n * 3).filter((e) => e.chatId === chatId).slice(-n);\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 滾動清理：刪除超過 RETENTION_DAYS 的 events\\n * \\n * 建議在 /dream 時呼叫\\n */\\nexport function rotateEventLog(): { deleted: number; kept: number } {\\n  if (!existsSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH)) {\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n\\n  try {\\n    const content = readFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n    const lines = content.trim().split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter(Boolean);\\n\\n    const cutoff = new Date();\\n    cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - RETENTION_DAYS);\\n    const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n    const kept: string[] = [];\\n    let deleted = 0;\\n\\n    for (const line of lines) {\\n      try {\\n        const event = JSON.parse(line) as StateEvent;\\n        if (event.ts >= cutoffStr) {\\n          kept.push(line);\\n        } else {\\n          deleted++;\\n        }\\n      } catch {\\n        // 無法解析的行直接丟棄\\n        deleted++;\\n      }\\n    }\\n\\n    writeFileSync(EVENT_LOG_PATH, kept.join(\\\"\\\\n\\\") + (kept.length ? \\\"\\\\n\\\" : \\\"\\\"), \\\"utf-8\\\");\\n\\n    return { deleted, kept: kept.length };\\n  } catch (err) {\\n    console.error(\\\"[event-log] Failed to rotate:\\\", err);\\n    return { deleted: 0, kept: 0 };\\n  }\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 統計過去 days 天的 tool_call 使用次數，依工具名稱聚合。\\n *\\n * 回傳依使用次數由多到少排序的陣列；total 為總呼叫數、failed 為失敗數。\\n */\\nexport function getToolUsageStats(days: number = 7): {\\n  byTool: Array<{ name: string; total: number; failed: number }>;\\n  total: number;\\n  failed: number;\\n} {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n\\n  const counts = new Map<string, { total: number; failed: number }>();\\n  let total = 0;\\n  let failed = 0;\\n\\n  for (const e of getRecentEvents(10000)) {\\n    if (e.type !== \\\"tool_call\\\" || e.ts < cutoffStr) continue;\\n    const name = (e.payload?.name as string) ?? \\\"tool\\\";\\n    const isFail = e.payload?.status === \\\"failed\\\";\\n    const cur = counts.get(name) ?? { total: 0, failed: 0 };\\n    cur.total++;\\n    if (isFail) cur.failed++;\\n    counts.set(name, cur);\\n    total++;\\n    if (isFail) failed++;\\n  }\\n\\n  const byTool = [...counts.entries()]\\n    .map(([name, v]) => ({ name, total: v.total, failed: v.failed }))\\n    .sort((a, b) => b.total - a.total);\\n\\n  return { byTool, total, failed };\\n}\\n\\n/**\\n * 取得 event log 統計\\n */\\nexport function getEventLogStats(): {\\n  totalEvents: number;\\n  oldestEvent?: string;\\n  newestEvent?: string;\\n  byType: Record<string, number>;\\n} {\\n  const events = getRecentEvents(10000); // 讀取全部（最多 10000）\\n\\n  if (events.length === 0) {\\n    return { totalEvents: 0, byType: {} };\\n  }\\n\\n  const byType: Record<string, number> = {};\\n  for (const e of events) {\\n    byType[e.type] = (byType[e.type] || 0) + 1;\\n  }\\n\\n  return {\\n    totalEvents: events.length,\\n    oldestEvent: events[0]?.ts,\\n    newestEvent: events[events.length - 1]?.ts,\\n    byType,\\n  };\\n}\\n\\n\",\"numLines\":228,\"startLine\":1,\"totalLines\":228}}"</outcome>

Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.\\n\\n**Goal:** Expand the status-server web UI into a specialist information center with dashboard, detail views, and Telegram Mini App integration, replacing Electron.\\n\\n**Architecture:** Hash-based SPA (`status-app/index.html`) with three routes: Dashboard (specialist cards + task list), Specialist Detail (tabbed config/preamble/history/artifacts/facts), and Live View (SSE streaming). Backend adds 6 API endpoints to `status-server.ts` reading from `specialists.json`, `events.jsonl`, artifacts dir, and facts shards. `/status` command drops Electron and uses `web_app` button or text fallback.\\n\\n**Tech Stack:** TypeScript (backend), vanilla HTML/JS (frontend), node:http server, SSE\\n\\n## Global Constraints\\n\\n- No new npm dependencies\\n- Pure HTML + vanilla JS frontend (no React/Vue/build pipeline)\\n- Hash-based routing (`#/...`), no server-side routing changes\\n- `status-store.ts` is not modified (existing task registry)\\n- `events.jsonl` reads limited to last 2000 lines\\n- Facts cache TTL: 60 seconds\\n- Dashboard polling interval: 3 seconds\\n- All existing SSE/cancel APIs remain unchanged\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Task 1: Backend — Specialist API endpoints\\n\\n**Files:**\\n- Modify: `src/status-server.ts` (add specialist routes + imports + helpers)\\n- Reference (read-only): `src/specialist.ts` (`getSpecialists`), `src/event-log.ts` (`getRecentEvents`), `src/config.ts` (`config.memoryDir`, `config.sessionCwd`)\\n\\n**Interfaces:**\\n- Consumes: `getSpecialists(): SpecialistsConfig` from `specialist.ts`, `getRecentEvents(n): StateEvent[]` from `event-log.ts`, `listActiveTasks(): TaskEntry[]` from `status-store.ts`, `config.memoryDir` / `config.sessionCwd` from `config.ts`\\n- Produces: 6 new HTTP endpoints consumed by frontend:\\n  - `GET /api/specialists` → `SpecialistSummary[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name` → `SpecialistDetail`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/preamble` → `{ content: string }`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/history` → `TaskHistoryEntry[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/artifacts` → `ArtifactEntry[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/facts` → `FactsSummary`\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 1: Add imports to status-server.ts**\\n\\nAdd after existing imports at top of `src/status-server.ts`:\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { readdir, stat } from \\\"node:fs/promises\\\";\\nimport { getSpecialists, type SpecialistEntry } from \\\"./specialist.js\\\";\\nimport { getRecentEvents, type StateEvent } from \\\"./event-log.js\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 2: Add helper — extract model from harness args**\\n\\nAdd above `startStatusServer` function:\\n\\n```typescript\\nfunction extractModel(entry: SpecialistEntry): string {\\n  const args = entry.harness.args;\\n  const idx = args.indexOf(\\\"--model\\\");\\n  return idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < args.length ? args[idx + 1] : \\\"default\\\";\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 3: Add helper — count recent specialist events**\\n\\n```typescript\\nfunction countRecentTasks(name: string, events: StateEvent[], days: number): number {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n  return events.filter(\\n    (e) => e.type === \\\"specialist_spawn\\\" && e.ts >= cutoffStr &&\\n      ((e.payload.name as string) === name || (e.payload.target as string) === name)\\n  ).length;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 4: Add helper — facts cache**\\n\\n```typescript\\nlet factsCache: { ts: number; data: Map<string, Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }>> } | null = null;\\nconst FACTS_CACHE_TTL = 60_000;\\n\\nasync function loadFactsForSpecialist(name: string): Promise<{ totalCount: number; recentFacts: Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }> }> {\\n  const now = Date.now();\\n  if (!factsCache || now - factsCache.ts > FACTS_CACHE_TTL) {\\n    factsCache = { ts: now, data: new Map() };\\n    const userId = (process.env.ALLOWED_USER_IDS ?? \\\"\\\").split(\\\",\\\")[0]?.trim();\\n    if (userId) {\\n      const shardDir = path.join(config.memoryDir, \\\"facts_Topic\\\", userId);\\n      try {\\n        const files = await readdir(shardDir);\\n        for (const file of files) {\\n          if (!file.endsWith(\\\".md\\\")) continue;\\n          const content = await readFile(path.join(shardDir, file), \\\"utf8\\\");\\n          const lines = content.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter((l) => l.startsWith(\\\"- [\\\"));\\n          for (const line of lines) {\\n            const idMatch = line.match(/\\\\[([^\\\\]]+)\\\\]/);\\n            const tsMatch = line.match(/\\\\[(\\\\d{4}-\\\\d{2}-\\\\d{2}T[^\\\\]]+)\\\\]/);\\n            const textMatch = line.match(/\\\\]\\\\s+(.+)$/);\\n            if (!idMatch || !textMatch) continue;\\n            const fact = { id: idMatch[1], timestamp: tsMatch?.[1] ?? \\\"\\\", text: textMatch[1] };\\n            for (const sp of getSpecialists()) {\\n              if (line.toLowerCase().includes(sp.name.toLowerCase())) {\\n                if (!factsCache.data.has(sp.name)) factsCache.data.set(sp.name, []);\\n                factsCache.data.get(sp.name)!.push(fact);\\n              }\\n            }\\n          }\\n        }\\n      } catch { /* shardDir may not exist */ }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const facts = factsCache.data.get(name) ?? [];\\n  return { totalCount: facts.length, recentFacts: facts.slice(-5).reverse() };\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 5: Add GET /api/specialists route**\\n\\nInside `createServer` handler, add **before** the `// ─── Static files` comment:\\n\\n```typescript\\n    // ─── Specialist API routes ─────────────────────────────────────────\\n    if (p === \\\"/api/specialists\\\" && req.method === \\\"GET\\\") {\\n      const specialists = getSpecialists();\\n      const active = listActiveTasks();\\n      const events = getRecentEvents(2000);\\n      const summaries = specialists.map((sp) => {\\n        const activeTask = active.find((t) => t.specialist === sp.name);\\n        return {\\n          name: sp.name,\\n          model: extractModel(sp),\\n          cwd: sp.cwd,\\n          maxTurns: sp.maxTurns ?? 15,\\n          timeoutMs: sp.timeoutMs ?? 1_800_000,\\n          mcpServers: (sp.mcpServers ?? []).filter((s: any) => !s.disabled).map((s: any) => s.name),\\n        status: activeTask ? \\\"busy\\\" : \\\"idle\\\",\\n        activeTaskId: activeTask?.taskId,\\n        recentTaskCount: countRecentTasks(sp.name, events, 7),\\n        harness: sp.harness,\\n        env: sp.env,\\n        mcpServersFull: (sp.mcpServers ?? []).filter((s: any) => !s.disabled).map((s: any) => ({\\n          name: s.name, command: s.command, url: s.url,\\n        })),\\n      });\\n      return;\\n    }\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 7: Add GET /api/specialists/:name/preamble route**\\n\\n```typescript\\n    const spPreambleMatch = p.match(/^\\\\/api\\\\/specialists\\\\/([^/]+)\\\\/preamble$/);\\n    if (spPreambleMatch && req.method === \\\"GET\\\") {\\n      const name = decodeURIComponent(spPreambleMatch[1]);\\n      const bridgeDir = path.resolve(config.sessionCwd);\\n      const preamblePath = path.join(bridgeDir, \\\"specialists\\\", name, \\\"preamble.md\\\");\\n      try {\\n        const content = await readFile(preamblePath, \\\"utf8\\\");\\n        json(res, { content });\\n      } catch {\\n        json(res, { error: \\\"preamble not found\\\" }, 404);\\n      }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 8: Add GET /api/specialists/:name/history route**\\n\\n```typescript\\n    const spHistoryMatch = p.match(/^\\\\/api\\\\/specialists\\\\/([^/]+)\\\\/history$/);\\n    if (spHistoryMatch && req.method === \\\"GET\\\") {\\n      const name = decodeURIComponent(spHistoryMatch[1]);\\n      const events = getRecentEvents(2000);\\n      const spawns = new Map<string, StateEvent>();\\n      const history: Array<Record<string, unknown>> = [];\\n      for (const e of events) {\\n        if (e.type === \\\"specialist_spawn\\\" &&\\n            ((e.payload.name as string) === name || (e.payload.target as string) === name)) {\\n          const taskId = (e.payload.taskId as string) ?? (e.payload.instanceId as string) ?? e.ts;\\n          spawns.set(taskId, e);\\n        }\\n        if (e.type === \\\"specialist_done\\\" &&\\n            ((e.payload.target as string) === name || (e.payload.name as string) === name)) {\\n          const taskId = (e.payload.taskId as string) ?? \\\"\\\";\\n          const spawn = spawns.get(taskId);\\n          const startTime = spawn?.ts ?? e.ts;\\n          const endTime = e.ts;\\n          const elapsed = Math.round((new Date(endTime).getTime() - new Date(startTime).getTime()) / 1000);\\n          history.push({\\n            taskId,\\n            goal: (e.payload.goal as string) ?? (e.payload.error ? \\\"failed\\\" : \\\"done\\\"),\\n            startTime, endTime, elapsedSec: elapsed,\\n            turns: e.payload.turns, verifier: e.payload.verifier,\\n          });\\n        }\\n      }\\n      json(res, history.reverse().slice(0, 20));\\n      return;\\n    }\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 9: Add GET /api/specialists/:name/artifacts route**\\n\\n```typescript\\n    const matched = files.filter((f) => f.includes(`_${name}_`) && f.endsWith(\\\".json\\\")).sort().reverse().slice(0, 20);\\n        const entries = await Promise.all(matched.map(async (f) => {\\n          const parts = f.replace(\\\".json\\\", \\\"\\\").split(\\\"_\\\");\\n          let sizeBytes = 0;\\n          try { sizeBytes = (await stat(path.join(artifactsDir, f))).size; } catch { /* ignore */ entries);\\n      } catch { json(res, []); }\\n      return;\\n    }\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 10: Add GET /api/specialists/:name/facts route**\\n\\n```typescript\\n    const spFactsMatch = await loadFactsForSpecialist(name);\\n      json(res, result);\\n      return;\\n    }\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 11: Verify TypeScript compiles**\\n\\nRun: `npx tsc --noEmit`\\nExpected: No }\\n}\\nasync function loadHistory(name, panel) {\\n  try {\\n    const data = await fetch(`${API}/api/specialists/${encodeURIComponent(name)}/history`).then(r => r.json());\\n    if (data.length === 0) { panel.innerHTML = '<div class=\\\"empty\\\">尚無歷史記錄</div>'; });\\n    panel.innerHTML = html;\\n  } catch { panel.innerHTML = '<div class=\\\"empty\\\">載入失敗</div>'; }\\n}\\n\\n// ─── Live View ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────────────\\nfunction renderLiveView(taskId) {\\n  autoScroll = true;\\n  app.innerHTML = `<button class=\\\"back-btn\\\" onclick=\\\"navigate('#/')\\\">← Dashboard</button>\\n    <div style=\\\"display:flex;align-items:center;justify-content:space-between;margin-bottom:8px\\\">\\n      <h1 style=\\\"margin:0\\\" id=\\\"liveTitle\\\">${esc(taskId)}</h1>\\n      <button class=\\\"cancel-btn\\\" id=\\\"liveCancel\\\">取消</button>\\n    </div><div class=\\\"live-view\\\">\\n      <div class=\\\"live-body\\\" id=\\\"liveBody\\\"></div>\\n      <div class=\\\"live-footer\\\"><span id=\\\"liveMeta\\\"></span><span id=\\\"liveStatus\\\">connecting...</span></div>\\n    </div>`;\\n  const liveBody = document.getElementById('liveBody');\\n  const liveStatus = document.getElementById('liveStatus');\\n  const liveMeta = document.getElementById('liveMeta');\\n  const liveTitle = document.getElementById('liveTitle');\\n  fetch(`${API}/api/status/${encodeURIComponent(taskId)}`).then(r=>r.json()).then(t=>{\\n    if(t&&!t.error) liveTitle.textContent=t.specialist||t.peer||taskId;\\n  }).catch(()=>{});\\n  eventSource = new EventSource(`${API}/api/status/${encodeURIComponent(taskId)}/stream`);\\n  eventSource.onmessage = (e) => {\\n    const msg = JSON.parse(e.data);\\n    if (msg.type==='chunk') {\\n      const el = document.createElement('div');\\n      el.className = `chunk ${msg.role||'agent'}`;\\n      el.textContent = msg.text;\\n      liveBody.appendChild(el);\\n      if (autoScroll) liveBody.scrollTop = liveBody.scrollHeight;\\n    } else if (msg.type==='status') {\\n      liveStatus.textContent = msg.status;\\n      liveMeta.textContent = msg.turns ? `Turn ${msg.turns}` : '';\\n      if (msg.status !== 'running') { eventSource.close(); `GET /api/specialists/:name/artifacts` → `ArtifactEntry[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/facts` → `FactsSummary`\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 1: Add imports to status-server.ts**\\n\\nAdd after existing imports at top of `src/status-server.ts`:\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { readdir, stat } from \\\"node:fs/promises\\\";\\nimport { getSpecialists, type SpecialistEntry } from \\\"./specialist.js\\\";\\nimport { getRecentEvents, type StateEvent } from \\\"./event-log.js\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 2: Add helper — extract model from harness args**\\n\\nAdd above `startStatusServer` function:\\n\\n```typescript\\nfunction extractModel(entry: SpecialistEntry): string {\\n  const args = entry.harness.args;\\n  const idx = args.indexOf(\\\"--model\\\");\\n  return idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < args.length ? args[idx + 1] : \\\"default\\\";\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 3: Add helper — count recent specialist events**\\n\\n```typescript\\nfunction countRecentTasks(name: string, events: StateEvent[], days: number): number {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n  return events.filter(\\n    (e) => e.type === \\\"specialist_spawn\\\" && e.ts >= cutoffStr &&\\n      ((e.payload.name as string) === name || (e.payload.target as string) === name)\\n  ).length;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 4: Add helper — facts cache**\\n\\n```typescript\\nlet factsCache: { ts: number; data: Map<string, Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }>> } | null = null;\\nconst FACTS_CACHE_TTL = 60_000;\\n\\nasync function loadFactsForSpecialist(name: string): Promise<{ totalCount: number; recentFacts: Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }> }> {\\n  const now = Date.now();\\n  if (!factsCache || now - factsCache.ts > FACTS_CACHE_TTL) {\\n    factsCache = { ts: now, data: new Map() };\\n    const userId = (process.env.ALLOWED_USER_IDS ?? \\\"\\\").split(\\\",\\\")[0]?.trim();\\n    if (userId) {\\n      const shardDir = path.join(config.memoryDir, \\\"facts_Topic\\\", userId);\\n      try {\\n        const files = await readdir(shardDir);\\n        for (const file of files) {\\n          if (!file.endsWith(\\\".md\\\")) continue;\\n          const content = await readFile(path.join(shardDir, file), \\\"utf8\\\");\\n          const lines = content.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter((l) => l.startsWith(\\\"- [\\\"));\\n          for (const line of lines) {\\n            const idMatch = line.match(/\\\\[([^\\\\]]+)\\\\]/);\\n            const tsMatch = line.match(/\\\\[(\\\\d{4}-\\\\d{2}-\\\\d{2}T[^\\\\]]+)\\\\]/);\\n            const textMatch = line.match(/\\\\]\\\\s+(.+)$/);\\n            if (!idMatch || !textMatch) continue;\\n            const fact = { id: idMatch[1], timestamp: tsMatch?.[1] ?? \\\"\\\", text: textMatch[1] };\\n            for (const sp of getSpecialists()) {\\n              if (line.toLowerCase().includes(sp.name.toLowerCase())) {\\n                if (!factsCache.data.has(sp.name)) factsCache.data.set(sp.name, []);\\n                factsCache.data.get(sp.name)!.push(fact);\\n              }\\n            }\\n          }\\n        }\\n      } catch { /* shardDir may not exist */ }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const facts = factsCache.data.get(name) ??   <parameters>"{\"file_path\":\"G:\\\\AI\\\\telegram-kiro-bridge-main\\\\docs\\\\superpowers\\\\plans\\\\2026-07-10-specialist-dashboard.md\",\"content\":\"# Specialist Dashboard Implementation Plan\\n\\n> **For agentic workers:** REQUIRED SUB-SKILL: Use superpowers:subagent-driven-development (recommended) or superpowers:executing-plans to implement this plan task-by-task. Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.\\n\\n**Goal:** Expand the status-server web UI into a specialist information center with dashboard, detail views, and Telegram Mini App integration, replacing Electron.\\n\\n**Architecture:** Hash-based SPA (`status-app/index.html`) with three routes: Dashboard (specialist cards + task list), Specialist Detail (tabbed config/preamble/history/artifacts/facts), and Live View (SSE streaming). Backend adds 6 API endpoints to `status-server.ts` reading from `specialists.json`, `events.jsonl`, artifacts dir, and facts shards. `/status` command drops Electron and uses `web_app` button or text fallback.\\n\\n**Tech Stack:** TypeScript (backend), vanilla HTML/JS (frontend), node:http server, SSE\\n\\n## Global Constraints\\n\\n- No new npm dependencies\\n- Pure HTML + vanilla JS frontend (no React/Vue/build pipeline)\\n- Hash-based routing (`#/...`), no server-side routing changes\\n- `status-store.ts` is not modified (existing task registry)\\n- `events.jsonl` reads limited to last 2000 lines\\n- Facts cache TTL: 60 seconds\\n- Dashboard polling interval: 3 seconds\\n- All existing SSE/cancel APIs remain unchanged\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Task 1: Backend — Specialist API endpoints\\n\\n**Files:**\\n- Modify: `src/status-server.ts` (add specialist routes + imports + helpers)\\n- Reference (read-only): `src/specialist.ts` (`getSpecialists`), `src/event-log.ts` (`getRecentEvents`), `src/config.ts` (`config.memoryDir`, `config.sessionCwd`)\\n\\n**Interfaces:**\\n- Consumes: `getSpecialists(): SpecialistsConfig` from `specialist.ts`, `getRecentEvents(n): StateEvent[]` from `event-log.ts`, `listActiveTasks(): TaskEntry[]` from `status-store.ts`, `config.memoryDir` / `config.sessionCwd` from `config.ts`\\n- Produces: 6 new HTTP endpoints consumed by frontend:\\n  - Steps use checkbox (`- [ ]`) syntax for tracking.\\n\\n**Goal:** Expand the status-server web UI into a specialist information center with dashboard, detail views, and Telegram Mini App integration, replacing Electron.\\n\\n**Architecture:** Hash-based SPA (`status-app/index.html`) with three routes: Dashboard (specialist cards + task list), Specialist Detail (tabbed config/preamble/history/artifacts/facts), and Live View (SSE streaming). Backend adds 6 API endpoints to `status-server.ts` reading from `specialists.json`, `events.jsonl`, artifacts dir, and facts shards. `/status` command drops Electron and uses `web_app` button or text fallback.\\n\\n**Tech Stack:** TypeScript (backend), vanilla HTML/JS (frontend), node:http server, SSE\\n\\n## Global Constraints\\n\\n- No new npm dependencies\\n- Pure HTML + vanilla JS frontend (no React/Vue/build pipeline)\\n- Hash-based routing (`#/...`), no server-side routing changes\\n- `status-store.ts` is not modified (existing task registry)\\n- `events.jsonl` reads limited to last 2000 lines\\n- Facts cache TTL: 60 seconds\\n- Dashboard polling interval: 3 seconds\\n- All existing SSE/cancel APIs remain unchanged\\n\\n---\\n\\n### Task 1: Backend — Specialist API endpoints\\n\\n**Files:**\\n- Modify: `src/status-server.ts` (add specialist routes + imports + helpers)\\n- Reference (read-only): `src/specialist.ts` (`getSpecialists`), `src/event-log.ts` (`getRecentEvents`), `src/config.ts` (`config.memoryDir`, `config.sessionCwd`)\\n\\n**Interfaces:**\\n- Consumes: `getSpecialists(): SpecialistsConfig` from `specialist.ts`, `getRecentEvents(n): StateEvent[]` from `event-log.ts`, `listActiveTasks(): TaskEntry[]` from `status-store.ts`, `config.memoryDir` / `config.sessionCwd` from `config.ts`\\n- Produces: 6 new HTTP endpoints consumed by frontend:\\n  - `GET /api/specialists` → `SpecialistSummary[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name` → `SpecialistDetail`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/preamble` → `{ content: string }`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/history` → `TaskHistoryEntry[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/artifacts` → `ArtifactEntry[]`\\n  - `GET /api/specialists/:name/facts` → `FactsSummary`\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 1: Add imports to status-server.ts**\\n\\nAdd after existing imports at top of `src/status-server.ts`:\\n\\n```typescript\\nimport { readdir, stat } from \\\"node:fs/promises\\\";\\nimport { getSpecialists, type SpecialistEntry } from \\\"./specialist.js\\\";\\nimport { getRecentEvents, type StateEvent } from \\\"./event-log.js\\\";\\nimport { config } from \\\"./config.js\\\";\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 2: Add helper — extract model from harness args**\\n\\nAdd above `startStatusServer` function:\\n\\n```typescript\\nfunction extractModel(entry: SpecialistEntry): string {\\n  const args = entry.harness.args;\\n  const idx = args.indexOf(\\\"--model\\\");\\n  return idx >= 0 && idx + 1 < args.length ? args[idx + 1] : \\\"default\\\";\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 3: Add helper — count recent specialist events**\\n\\n```typescript\\nfunction countRecentTasks(name: string, events: StateEvent[], days: number): number {\\n  const cutoff = new Date();\\n  cutoff.setDate(cutoff.getDate() - days);\\n  const cutoffStr = cutoff.toISOString();\\n  return events.filter(\\n    (e) => e.type === \\\"specialist_spawn\\\" && e.ts >= cutoffStr &&\\n      ((e.payload.name as string) === name || (e.payload.target as string) === name)\\n  ).length;\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 4: Add helper — facts cache**\\n\\n```typescript\\nlet factsCache: { ts: number; data: Map<string, Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }>> } | null = null;\\nconst FACTS_CACHE_TTL = 60_000;\\n\\nasync function loadFactsForSpecialist(name: string): Promise<{ totalCount: number; recentFacts: Array<{ id: string; timestamp: string; text: string }> }> {\\n  const now = Date.now();\\n  if (!factsCache || now - factsCache.ts > FACTS_CACHE_TTL) {\\n    factsCache = { ts: now, data: new Map() };\\n    const userId = (process.env.ALLOWED_USER_IDS ?? \\\"\\\").split(\\\",\\\")[0]?.trim();\\n    if (userId) {\\n      const shardDir = path.join(config.memoryDir, \\\"facts_Topic\\\", userId);\\n      try {\\n        const files = await readdir(shardDir);\\n        for (const file of files) {\\n          if (!file.endsWith(\\\".md\\\")) continue;\\n          const content = await readFile(path.join(shardDir, file), \\\"utf8\\\");\\n          const lines = content.split(\\\"\\\\n\\\").filter((l) => l.startsWith(\\\"- [\\\"));\\n          for (const line of lines) {\\n            const idMatch = line.match(/\\\\[([^\\\\]]+)\\\\]/);\\n            const tsMatch = line.match(/\\\\[(\\\\d{4}-\\\\d{2}-\\\\d{2}T[^\\\\]]+)\\\\]/);\\n            const textMatch = line.match(/\\\\]\\\\s+(.+)$/);\\n            if (!idMatch || !textMatch) continue;\\n            const fact = { id: idMatch[1], timestamp: tsMatch?.[1] ?? \\\"\\\", text: textMatch[1] };\\n            for (const sp of getSpecialists()) {\\n              if (line.toLowerCase().includes(sp.name.toLowerCase())) {\\n                if (!factsCache.data.has(sp.name)) factsCache.data.set(sp.name, []);\\n                factsCache.data.get(sp.name)!.push(fact);\\n              }\\n            }\\n          }\\n        }\\n      } catch { /* shardDir may not exist */ }\\n    }\\n  }\\n  const facts = factsCache.data.get(name) ?? [];\\n  return { totalCount: facts.length, recentFacts: facts.slice(-5).reverse() };\\n}\\n```\\n\\n- [ ] **Step 5: Add GET /api/specialists route**\\n\\nInside `createServer` handler, add **before** the `// ─── Static files` comment:\\n\\n```typescript\\n    // ─── Specialist API routes ─────────────────────────────────────────\\n    if (p === \\\"/api/specialists\\\" && req.method === \\\"GET\\\") {\\n      const specialists = getSpecialists();\\n      const active = listActiveTasks();\\n      const events = getRecentEvents(2000);\\n      const summaries = specialists.map((sp) => {\\n        const activeTask = active.find((t) => t.specialist === sp.name);\\n        return {\\n          name: sp.name,\\n          model: extractModel(sp),\\n          cwd: sp.cwd,\\n          maxTurns: sp.maxTurns ?? 15,\\n          timeoutMs: sp.timeoutMs ?? 1_800_000,\\n          mcpServers: (sp.mcpServers ??
